name: Auth Form
description: Unified authentication form with multiple modes: login, register, forgot-password, reset-password, verify-email, mfa-setup, mfa-verify, phone-verify.

register.description: Registration form with password strength indicator

slots.form: Name, email, password inputs with strength indicator

forgot-password.description: Password reset request form with email input and success confirmation message

reset-password.description: Set new password form with confirmation

slots.form: New password and confirm password inputs

mfa-setup.description: Multi-factor authentication setup with QR code

slots.qr: QR code image for authenticator app

mfa-verify.description: Multi-factor authentication code entry during login with six-digit input and backup code fallback

phone-verify.description: Phone number verification with SMS code

visual_brief: Centered single-column form card constrained to 400px max-width. Header area shows logo and a welcome title. Form fields stack vertically with labeled inputs for email and password. A horizontal divider with 'or continue with' text separates the form from OAuth provider buttons (Google, GitHub icons in bordered pill buttons). Footer contains muted text links for Register and Forgot Password. Error messages appear inline below inputs in destructive color. MFA presets show a 6-digit code input with large separated character boxes. Verify-email preset centers a large mail icon with instructional text.

layout_hints.shell_ownership: The centered shell owns viewport centering and the outer card frame. Route components should render auth content inside that card rhythm, not add another full-height centering wrapper.
layout_hints.field_stack: Fields, CTA, OAuth buttons, and footer links should align to one stable column width. OAuth rows should feel like part of the form, not a detached widget.
layout_hints.verification_states: Pending-email, MFA, and reset-success states should feel like transitions of the same auth surface rather than unrelated page layouts.

responsive.mobile: Form takes full width with horizontal padding. OAuth buttons stack vertically. MFA code inputs remain large for touch targets. Footer links stack.
responsive.tablet: Centered 400px form. Standard spacing. OAuth buttons render in a row.
responsive.desktop: Centered form with generous padding. All elements comfortably spaced in their standard layout.

motion.micro: Buttons and OAuth rows use calm hover and focus transitions. Code-entry boxes may softly highlight the active digit slot.
motion.transitions: State changes between login, register, reset, and MFA should cross-fade or slide minimally over 180-250ms.
motion.ambient: Do not add decorative ambient motion inside auth forms beyond a gentle entrance treatment.

keyboard: Tab moves through fields, provider buttons, and footer links in a logical order.
Enter submits the current form when focus is inside the primary auth field group.
OTP and MFA inputs should support sequential typing and backspace navigation between code slots.
announcements: Announce inline validation errors with field-specific guidance.
Announce verification-success and reset-email-sent states explicitly.
accessibility.focus_management: Move focus to the first invalid field after validation failure. When auth mode changes, move focus to the heading or first interactive field in the new mode.
